name: Employer Retaliation After Injury Report West Jordan

mainEntity.name: What if my West Jordan employer retaliates after I report a workers comp injury?
mainEntity.text: What if my West Jordan employer retaliates after I report a workers comp injury?

acceptedAnswer.text: Utah law prohibits retaliation for filing workers comp claims; remedies include reinstatement, back pay, or damages via Labor Commission complaint within 180 days of retaliation[4].

suggestedAnswer.text: Retaliation like firing or demotion after reporting in West Jordan violates Utah Code §34A-2-106. File a discrimination claim with the Antidiscrimination Division. Document everything; workers comp doesn't bar wrongful termination suits. Insurers may pressure employers—seek legal help early[1][4].
